influencer_alerts.content: ☕ Cosy morning at Costa Coffee Guildford High Street! Their Toffee Penny Latte is absolutely everything right now 🍂 Perfect pre-Christmas treat. Full review on the blog tonight! #CostaLife #GuildfordEats #CoffeeReview
influencer_alerts.action_recommended: Engage — reply with a thank-you and tag the store. Consider sending a DM to offer a complimentary seasonal drink for the review.

influencer_alerts.content: Looking for the best coffee spots in Guildford this Christmas? Our top picks coming later today 👀 @CostaCoffee always delivers 🎄
influencer_alerts.action_recommended: Monitor — when the article publishes, share via Costa's social channels. Brief the team to maintain high presentation standards today.

mentions.content: Absolutely love this Costa! The barista Marcus made my oat flat white perfectly today — exactly the right temperature. Will definitely be back.
Waited 15 minutes for a flat white at lunchtime. Three people behind the counter chatting. Won't be rushing back.
The Christmas cups at @CostaCoffee Guildford are SO cute this year 😍 It's beginning to feel a lot like Christmas ☕🎄
Great location near the Christmas market. Slightly cramped when busy but the staff were friendly and the Gingerbread Latte was on point.
Starting every Monday right ☀️ @CostaCoffee GLD the team there are always so warm and welcoming. The new Pistachio Iced Latte is AMAZING even in winter 🍵 #MondayMotivation
Mobile order wasn't ready when I arrived even though the app said it was. Had to wait another 8 minutes. This happens too often at this store.
Best Costa in Guildford, hands down. Always consistent. The new Barista Maestro Priya really knows her stuff — got my cortado spot on.

response_templates.negative_wait_time: Hi {name}, thank you for your feedback. We're sorry you had to wait longer than expected — this isn't the experience we want for our customers. We've taken this on board with our team. We'd love the chance to make it right — please DM us your Costa Club number and we'll add some points to your account. ☕
response_templates.negative_mobile_order: Hi {name}, we're sorry your mobile order experience wasn't smooth. We're actively working on improving our mobile order preparation times. Thank you for letting us know — your feedback directly helps us improve.
response_templates.positive_staff: Thank you so much for this lovely review, {name}! We'll make sure to pass on your kind words to the team — they'll be thrilled! See you again soon ☕🎄

mentions.content: At least @CostaCoffee Guildford Station is keeping us sane during this nightmare signal failure. Queue out the door but moving fast. Good work team 👏
The service is great but seating is almost impossible during rush hour. Had to stand with my coffee and briefcase — not ideal.

influencer_alerts.content: Checking out all the coffee spots on North Street before the new Pret opens Monday 👀 First up... @CostaCoffee Brighton North Street. Review TBC! ☕
influencer_alerts.action_recommended: HIGH PRIORITY — This influencer is doing a competitive review ahead of Pret opening. Ensure the store is at its absolute best today. Consider briefing the manager to greet them warmly. First impressions matter.

mentions.content: Quality has dropped recently. My latte tasted burnt twice in a row. Something wrong with the machine? Used to be my favourite Costa.
Sunny Brighton morning + Costa = life is good ☀️☕ Loving the new cups this season #CostaLife #BrightonVibes
